# CLAUDE.md

Shared Agent Pack provides the shared Claude Code wiring for this repository.

## Source of truth

- Edit shared definitions in `agent-pack/core/`.
- Edit MCP registrations in `agent-pack/mcp/registry.json`.
- Regenerate Claude outputs with `powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-agent-pack.ps1`.
- Do not hand-edit generated files in `.claude/` or this file.

## Local commands

- `/build-feature`: Implement a scoped feature in the current repository, validate the result, and summarize the change set.
- `/review-diff`: Review a diff or pending change set for bugs, regressions, risky assumptions, and missing tests.

## Local subagents

- `coder`: Implementation specialist
- `planner`: Scoping and sequencing specialist
- `reviewer`: Risk-focused reviewer

## Local skills

- `find-skills`: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. Path: `.claude/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md`
- `frontend-design`: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics. Path: `.claude/skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md`
- `repo-conventions`: Apply the shared conventions for this repository's cross-host agent pack. Use when adding or updating commands, subagents, skills, MCP registry entries, generator scripts, or host adapters for Claude Code and Codex. Path: `.claude/skills/repo-conventions/SKILL.md`
- `vercel-react-best-practices`: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements. Path: `.claude/skills/vercel-react-best-practices/SKILL.md`
- `web-design-guidelines`: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices". Path: `.claude/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md`

## MCP servers to register

- `github`: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github (env: GITHUB_TOKEN)
- `notion`: npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-notion (env: NOTION_TOKEN)

## Working rules

- Use the generated commands in `.claude/commands/` as the user-facing entrypoints.
- Use the generated subagents in `.claude/agents/` for role-specific handoffs.
- Load `repo-conventions` before changing the agent pack itself.
- Read `app/CLAUDE.md` before changing application code under `app/`.
